title: Heineken Names Rafael Oliveira as CEO to Lead Turnaround
title_cn: 喜力任命拉斐尔·奥利维拉为首席执行官，领导扭亏为盈
summary: Heineken NV appointed Rafael Oliveira chief executive officer, as the Dutch beer maker breaks with habit by hiring an outsider to try to reverse a slump in demand.

summary: Allegations that WiseTech Global Ltd.’s billionaire chairman, Richard White, took advantage of a woman’s immigration status for sex are testing the patience of the Australian software company’s shareholders.

title: Tencent Is Said to Mull Exits From Game Studios Like Marvelous
title_cn: 传腾讯正在考虑退出Marvelous等游戏工作室
summary: Tencent Holdings Ltd. is negotiating exits from several game studio investments in Japan, including Tokyo-traded Marvelous Inc., as part of a reassessment of the company’s global portfolio, people with knowledge of the matter said.

title: Greeks Get Priced Out of Summer Even After Economic Recovery
title_cn: 即使经济复苏后，希腊人仍无法度过夏季
summary: Life isn’t what it used to be as a squeeze on household incomes increasingly makes long beach vacations a relic of a more prosperous past.

title: Nissan Director Voted Out in Rare Public Standoff With Renault
title_cn: 日产董事在与雷诺罕见的公开对峙中投票落选
summary: Nissan Motor Co. shareholders rejected the reappointment of Motoo Nagai to the board, ending the tenure of an influential outside director after he lost the support of key stakeholder Renault SA, following a rare public standoff at Japan’s typically staid annual meetings.

summary: A US labor board judge ruled that Amazon.com Inc. must collectively bargain with California warehouse workers, teeing up a legal battle that could end with President Donald Trump’s appointees reversing a major union-friendly precedent.

title: WiseTech Founder Denies Human Trafficking
title_cn: 慧咨科技创始人否认人口贩卖
summary: Good morning from a very chilly Melbourne. SpaceX’s stock has come back to earth with a thud, tumbling 23% in just three days and wiping more than $600 billion off its market value. The selloff comes as the company prepares its first-ever investment-grade bond sale to help fund its growing AI ambitions.- Keira Wright, Australian Energy Reporter

summary: Bending Spoons SpA, which acquires struggling software businesses, and some of its backers are seeking to raise as much as $1.62 billion in an initial public offering.

title: A Decade After Brexit Vote, Britain Can’t Keep a Prime Minister
title_cn: 英国脱欧公投十年后，英国无法留任首相
summary: How British Prime Minister Keir Starmer became the country’s sixth leader to step down in a decade and what this revolving door means for UK politics.

title: Korean Stocks Tumble 9% From Record, Triggering Trading Halt
title_cn: 韩国股市较纪录暴跌 9%，引发交易暂停
summary: South Korean stocks tumbled from a record high as investors sold off chip heavyweights on renewed concern that the rally has become overstretched.

title: Stocks Hit by Tech Selloff, Yen Near 40-Year Low: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 股市遭遇科技股抛售，日元接近 40 年低点：市场休整
summary: Global stocks slumped as investors rotated out of some of this year’s high-performing technology shares while awaiting further developments in US-Iran peace talks.

title: Oil Extends Decline as Iran Waiver Signals Peace Talks Progress
title_cn: 伊朗豁免标志着和谈取得进展，油价延续跌势
summary: Oil extended declines on signs of progress toward an agreement to end the Iran war, which included a US waiver allowing some sales of crude and fuels from the Islamic Republic.

title: European Stocks Set to Tumble as Tech Selloff Bites
title_cn: 科技股遭遇抛售，欧洲股市将暴跌

title: Zerodha's Kamath Backs Indian Stocks, Boosts Allocation
title_cn: Zerodha 的 Kamath 支持印度股票并增加配置
summary: Zerodha co-founder, Nikhil Kamath, says he's increasing exposure to Indian equities despite recent foreign outflows and muted market performance. He joined Bloomberg's Minmin Low on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian and appeared on Insight with Haslinda Amin. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Stocks in Hong Kong Eye Bear Market on Spending Woes
title_cn: 中国股市因支出困境而在香港遭遇熊市
summary: Chinese equities in Hong Kong edged toward a bear market as sentiment soured on tepid consumer spending and fading confidence in e-commerce firms.

title: India’s Economic Activity Slowed in June, Flash PMI Shows
title_cn: PMI 预览数据显示印度 6 月经济活动放缓
summary: India’s economic activity slowed this month as cost pressures and softening demand weighed on businesses, a flash survey by HSBC Holdings Plc showed Tuesday.

title: Pure Lithium's CEO Bodoin on Battery Technology
title_cn: Pure Lithium 首席执行官 Bodoin 谈电池技术
summary: Emilie Bodoin, Founder, Chairman & CEO of Pure Lithium, discusses advances in battery technology and supply chains. The company has a pilot line launching in Chicago and is seeking partners for commercialization. She speaks on the sidelines of the World Economic Forum in Dalian with Bloomberg’s Minmin Low. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IFM Investors Nears 50% Stake in Deal Target Atlas Arteria
title_cn: IFM 投资者持有交易目标 Atlas Arteria 近 50% 的股份
summary: IFM Investors is nearing a 50% holding in Australia-listed toll road operator Atlas Arteria Ltd., ahead of a Thursday night deadline on its takeover bid.

title: Novonesis on Business Strategy
title_cn: Novonesis 的商业战略
summary: Ester Baiget, CEO of Danish biosolutions company Novonesis, discusses the firm's China business and growth strategy. She speaks with Minmin Low from the sidelines of the World Economic Forum's Annual Meeting of the New Champions in Dalian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: HKEX on IPO Outlook
title_cn: 香港交易所首次公开招股展望
summary: Johnson Chui, Head of Global Issuer Services at HKEX, says the exchange operator has seen greater diversity in the types of companies listing in Hong Kong. He speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of the World Economic Forum's Annual Meeting of the New Champions in Dalian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gold Falls as Inflation Risks Outweigh Progress in US-Iran Talks
title_cn: 通胀风险超过美伊谈判进展，金价下跌
summary: Gold declined as inflationary concerns overshadowed early optimism around negotiations to resolve the Iran war.

title: Nomura Joins Sony in Powering Big Week for Japanese Bond Sales
title_cn: 野村证券与索尼一起为日本债券销售大周提供动力
summary: Nomura Holdings Inc and Sony Group Corp. are leading a slew of deals from Asia in global bonds markets on Tuesday, in what is shaping up to be one of the biggest weeks this year overseas for Japanese issuers.

title: Baht Drops to One-Year Low on Expectations of Rate Gap With US
title_cn: 由于预期与美国存在利差，泰铢跌至一年低点
summary: The baht falls to a one-year low on expectations of a wider interest rate gap between the US and Thailand as domestic demand comes under pressure from multiple headwinds.

title: SK Hynix ETF’s Assets Soar to $17 Billion, Biggest in Hong Kong
title_cn: SK海力士ETF资产飙升至170亿美元，为香港最大
summary: A leveraged exchange traded product tied to SK Hynix Inc. has amassed more than $16.8 billion in assets under management, making it Hong Kong’s largest ETF and underscoring investors’ voracious appetite for risky semiconductor bets.

title: Iran Rushes to Woo Asia’s Largest Oil Importers After US Waiver
title_cn: 美国豁免后伊朗急于吸引亚洲最大石油进口国
summary: Iran is racing to court some of Asia’s largest oil buyers as a 60-day US sanctions waiver takes effect, a temporary lifeline that should allow Tehran to resume exports and begin clearing a backlog of cargoes on the water, even as peace talks continue.

title: GM-Backed Self-Driving Firm Momenta Said to Near Hong Kong IPO
title_cn: 通用汽车支持的自动驾驶公司 Momenta 据称即将在香港首次公开募股
summary: Momenta Global Ltd. is set to start gauging investor interest for an initial public offering in Hong Kong as early as this week, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Tech Tumble Overshadows Markets' Iran Hopes | The Asia Trade 6/23/2026
title_cn: 科技股暴跌令市场对伊朗的希望黯然失色亚洲贸易 6/23/2026
summary: "Bloomberg: The Asia Trade" brings you everything you need to know to get ahead as the trading day begins in Asia. Bloomberg TV is live from Tokyo and Sydney with Shery Ahn and Paul Allen, getting insight and analysis from newsmakers and industry leaders on the biggest stories shaping global markets. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Deadly H5 Bird Flu Spreads Worldwide With Australia Outbreak
title_cn: 致命 H5 禽流感随澳大利亚疫情在全球蔓延
summary: Australian chicken producer Inghams has implemented a “complete lock-down” at its Western Australia operations following the detection of the H5N1 avian influenza in the state. With the virus having reached every continent, the outbreak raises risks for the global agricultural sector and the broader ecosystem. University of Tasmania senior lecturer Jane Younger discusses the potential impact on Australia’s food supply and wildlife on “Bloomberg: The Asia Trade.” (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Global Funds Snap Indian Stock Selling Streak as Oil Shock Ebbs
title_cn: 随着石油危机的消退，全球基金终止了印度股市的连续抛售
summary: Foreign investors turned buyers of Indian equities for the first time in two months as easing Middle East tensions and lower oil prices revive appetite for the market.

title: Sony Plans First Dollar-Bond Sale in Nearly Three Decades
title_cn: 索尼计划近三年来首次发行美元债券
summary: Sony Group Corp. was still marketing the original PlayStation when it last tapped the US investment-grade bond market. Almost three decades later, it’s readying a comeback.

title: Japan’s Five-Year Bond Sale Draws Soft Demand on Rate Hike Fears
title_cn: 由于加息担忧，日本五年期债券发行需求疲软
summary: Japan’s five-year government bond auction Tuesday saw lower demand than the 12-month average, as yen weakness added to expectations that the Bank of Japan may need to raise rates faster.

title: Deutsche Bank Cuts Gold Forecasts up to 22% as Bulls Temper View
title_cn: 由于多头情绪缓和，德意志银行将黄金预测下调至 22%
summary: Deutsche Bank AG reduced its gold-price forecasts by as much as 22%, as investors become more wary about the outlook for US monetary policy and investment demand for the precious metal dries up.

title: Greenspan’s Legacy Is as Convoluted as His Words
title_cn: 格林斯潘的遗产和他的话一样令人费解
summary: His reputation no longer lies in post-crisis tatters, but should it inspire Trump 2.0?

title: Europe Sees 6 Billion Reasons for New Levy on Online Shoppers
title_cn: 欧洲有 60 亿个理由对网购者征收新税
summary: Bargain-hunting consumers across the European Union will start feeling the pinch of higher online shopping costs next week when a new levy primarily targeting China comes into force, adding a layer of trade friction between the two economies.

title: SBP Group Eyes Innovation as It Shifts Beyond Generics
title_cn: SBP 集团着眼于创新，超越仿制药
summary: SBP Group CEO Eric Tse discusses his outlook for China's healthcare sector and how one of China's old-guard pharmaceutical players aims to transition from generics focused model to drug development. He speaks with Stephen Engle from the sidelines of 'The World Economic Forum's Annual Meeting of the New Champions' in Dalian. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US-Iran Talks Continue as Trump Administration Allows Oil Sales
title_cn: 特朗普政府允许石油销售，美伊谈判继续进行
summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal. Bloomberg's Abeer Abu Omar reports from Dubai. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: CR New Energy’s Record IPO Gets Strong Retail Demand in Shenzhen
title_cn: 华润新能源IPO创纪录，深圳零售需求旺盛
summary: China Resources New Energy Holdings Ltd. drew strong demand from investors as it opened books for what is set to be the largest-ever initial public offering on the Shenzhen Stock Exchange, underscoring the appetite for new listings even beyond the artificial intelligence supply chain.

title: Aluminum Falls as Peace Talk Progress Points to Returning Supply
title_cn: 和谈进展表明供应恢复，铝价下跌
summary: Aluminum touched a three-month low as progress in Middle East peace talks fueled expectations of a return of supplies from the key metal-producing region.

title: Qualcomm Nears Deal for AI Chip Startup Modular
title_cn: 高通接近与 AI 芯片初创公司 Modular 达成交易
summary: Qualcomm Inc. is in advanced talks to acquire Modular Inc. in a transaction valuing the artificial intelligence infrastructure software company at about $4 billion, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: India’s Biggest Equity Fund Makes Contrarian IT Stocks Bet
title_cn: 印度最大的股票基金逆势押注 IT 股票
summary: India’s largest actively managed equity fund is betting against investor fears over artificial intelligence’s impact on the outsourcing industry as it snaps up the nation’s beaten-down IT stocks.

title: Masayoshi Son Dismisses Musk’s Idea for Orbital Data Centers
title_cn: 孙正义驳斥了马斯克关于轨道数据中心的想法
summary: SoftBank Group Corp. founder Masayoshi Son said there’s little merit to building data centers in space, as championed by Elon Musk, predicting that the AI race will be clinched by compute on Earth.

title: The Hidden Costs of Leveraged ETFs
title_cn: 杠杆ETF的隐性成本
summary: A leveraged ETF linked to SK Hynix has grown larger than Hong Kong's oldest ETF, which tracks the Hang Seng Index. The milestone highlights investors' voracious appetite for risky bets on the booming semiconductor sector. However, Bloomberg Intelligence says products such as the SK Hynix 2x Leveraged ETF carry a hidden structural drag that could erode investor returns over time. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: India to Share Rocket Tech to Hasten Development of Space Firms
title_cn: 印度将分享火箭技术以加速航天公司的发展
summary: India said it plans to share its technology involving the Polar Satellite Launch Vehicle, the country’s most reliable rocket, to help speed up development of the local space industry.

title: WiseTech Chairman White Denies Human Trafficking Involvement
title_cn: 慧咨科技董事长怀特否认参与人口贩卖
summary: WiseTech Global Ltd. said Chairman Richard White has denied being involved in human trafficking after reports that the billionaire is being investigated by police over claims he used a woman’s immigration status for sex.

title: Internet Stocks Will Be Next Area of AI Cycle, Standard Chartered Says
title_cn: 渣打银行表示，互联网股票将成为人工智能周期的下一个领域
summary: Standard Chartered's Daniel Lam says the US equities market is "probably going to have a little bit of mild correction, not a lot, or stay around the current levels." He also tells Bloomberg Television that "the next area of this AI cycle is going to be the internet stocks." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceX Fall Continues, Erasing Billions in Market Value
title_cn: SpaceX 持续下跌，市值蒸发数十亿
summary: SpaceX shares slipped for a third straight day, shedding hundreds of billions of dollars in market value, after the company said it is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time. Bloomberg's Anthony Stephens and Norah Mulinda break down the latest developments. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Gas Stations Accused of Using AI to Boost California Prices
title_cn: 加油站被指控利用人工智能推高加州油价
summary: A group of California consumers claimed in a lawsuit that gas station owners including Walmart Inc., Marathon Petroleum Corp., BP Plc and 7-Eleven Inc. are using artificial intelligence to illegally manipulate pump prices in the state that already has the highest rates in the US.

title: Tech Selloff Drags Stocks Lower | The Close 6/22/2026
title_cn: 科技股抛售拖累股市走低收盘价 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg Television brings you the latest news and analysis leading up to the final minutes and seconds before and after the closing bell on Wall Street. Today's guests are Wells Fargo Global Investment Strategist Veronica Willis, US Bank Chief Product Officer, Business Banking Shruti Patel, Susquehanna Senior Equity Research Analyst, Tech Hardware Mehdi Hosseini, Former Fed Governor & Monetary Policy Analytics Chairman Laurence Meyer, Bokeh Capital Partners Founder & Chief Investment Officer Kim Forrest, Former Kansas City Fed President Thomas Hoenig, JPM Alternatives Strategist Aaron Mulvihill, Weil, Gotshal & Manges Entertainment, Sports & Media Head Tom Ara, Cotopaxi CEO Lindsay Shumlas, & NFL Hall of Famer Terrell Owens & Syntilay CEO Ben Weiss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oracle Cut 21,000 Jobs in 12 Months, Says AI Replaced Some Roles
title_cn: 甲骨文在 12 个月内裁员 21,000 人，称人工智能取代了部分角色
summary: Oracle Corp. reduced its workforce by 21,000 employees in the past 12 months, a wider scale than previously known, including those whose jobs were eliminated by the use of artificial intelligence.

title: Media Consolidation in Its ‘Middle Innings’: Tom Ara
title_cn: 媒体整合的“中局”：汤姆·阿拉
summary: Tom Ara, Weil, Gotshal & Manges Entertainment, Sport & Media Head, discusses significant mergers and acquisitions in Hollywood during the first half of 2026. Highlighted deals include Fox's $22 billion investment in Roku and Paramount's $110 billion acquisition of Warner Brothers Discovery. Ara explains that the market has shifted from a cautious stance last year to a more confident environment, leading to increased capital deployment and ongoing consolidation in the entertainment sector. He speaks with Romaine Bostick & Katie Greifeld on "The Close." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Getty Images Surges 145% After Announcing OpenAI Deal
title_cn: 宣布与 OpenAI 达成交易后，Getty Images 股价飙升 145%
summary: Shares of stock-photo company Getty Images Holdings Inc. soared as much as 145% on Monday after it announced a licensing deal with OpenAI.

title: SpaceX Falls for Third Day, Erases $600 Billion in Market Value
title_cn: SpaceX 连续第三天下跌，市值蒸发 6000 亿美元
summary: SpaceX shares slipped for a third straight day, shedding hundreds of billions of dollars in market value, after the Elon Musk-led company said it is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time, part of what’s expected to be a massive borrowing spree to fund its artificial-intelligence ambitions.

title: Microsoft and Chevron Sign 20-Year Power Deal For Texas Data Center
title_cn: 微软和雪佛龙签署德克萨斯数据中心 20 年电力协议
summary: Chevron Corp. signed a 20-year deal with Microsoft Corp. to provide natural-gas fired power for a proposed West Texas data center, which could be one of the biggest in the US.

title: Columbia Threadneedle's Wade Sees AI Buoying Tech Rally
title_cn: Columbia Threadneedle 的 Wade 看到人工智能推动技术反弹
summary: The boom in artificial-intelligence spending is actually accelerating, setting up the rally in tech stocks to continue for at least another couple of quarters, according to Tiffany Wade, a senior portfolio manager at Columbia Threadneedle Investments. She speaks with Ed Ludlow on Bloomberg Television's "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Alphabet Shares Drop After Second AI Star Departs for Rival
title_cn: 第二位人工智能明星离开竞争对手后 Alphabet 股价下跌
summary: Alphabet Inc. shares tumbled on Monday following the departure of another high-profile artificial intelligence leader to a rival.

title: SpaceX Readies Its $20 Billion Bond Debut to Fund AI Ambition
title_cn: SpaceX 准备发行 200 亿美元债券，为人工智能雄心提供资金
summary: SpaceX is selling investment-grade bonds for the first time in what’s expected to be the start of a massive borrowing spree to fund the company’s AI ambitions following its record $75 billion IPO.

title: SpaceX Kicks Off High-Grade Bond Sale | Bloomberg Tech 6/22/2026
title_cn: SpaceX 启动高等级债券发售彭博科技 2026 年 6 月 22 日
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down SpaceX's first-ever investment-grade bond offering following its record-breaking IPO. Plus, Micron strikes an AI Infrastructure agreement with Anthropic to drive enterprise AI adoption. And Chevron signs a 20-year deal with Microsoft to power a West Texas data center that could be one of the biggest in the US. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: AI-Services Startup Baseten Nabs $13 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 人工智能服务初创公司 Baseten 估值达 130 亿美元
summary: Baseten, which provides software and computing capacity to companies tapping into lower-cost AI models, just closed a $1.5 billion Series F round at a $13 billion valuation. Baseten CEO Tuhin Srivastava and Apoorv Agrawal, partner at Altimeter, which co-lead this round, sit down with Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Valve Prices Steam Machine Video Game Console Above $1,000, Citing Component Shortage
title_cn: Valve 以组件短缺为由，将 Steam 视频游戏机价格提高到 1,000 美元以上
summary: Valve Corp. announced pricing and availability details for the Steam Machine, a cube-shaped video game console that has seen its release pushed back several months due to pricing volatility around memory, solid-state drives and other components.

title: Apple’s New CEO Must Restore Company’s Design Edge: Power On
title_cn: 苹果新任首席执行官必须恢复公司的设计优势：启动
summary: The top priority for new Apple CEO John Ternus should be revamping the company’s design team and putting the focus back on the look and feel of products, writes Bloomberg's Mark Gurman in his latest Power On newsletter. He joins Ed Ludlow for more on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft, Chevron Sign Power Deal for Texas Data Center
title_cn: 微软与雪佛龙签署德克萨斯州数据中心电力协议
summary:
Chevron Corp. signed a 20-year deal with Microsoft Corp. to provide natural-gas fired power for a proposed West Texas data center, which could be one of the biggest in the US.

The proposed plant, Project Kilby, is expected to start producing power by 2028 and will ramp up to 2.67 gigawatts over time, Houston-based Chevron said in a statement Monday. That’s enough to power more than 530,000 Texas homes. The oil giant, which is collaborating on the development with investment fund Engine No. 1, plans to make a final investment decision later this year. Bloomberg News previously reported the companies were in exclusive talks over a long-term power deal.

For more, we speak with Kevin Crowley, Bloomberg News Oil Reporter. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Kids’ Online Safety Bill Deal Struck by House GOP, Democrats
title_cn: 众议院共和党和民主党达成儿童在线安全法案协议
summary: House lawmakers have reached a bipartisan deal on a legislative package intended to strengthen online safety and privacy protections for children and teenagers—a key sign of progress on a major policy priority.

title: Tech Rally Is Seen Having More Runway as AI Spending Gains Speed
title_cn: 随着人工智能支出的加速，科技股的上涨将有更多的空间
summary: Technology stocks will extend their rally for at least another couple of quarters as artificial intelligence infrastructure spending accelerates beyond the pace of the past two years, Columbia Threadneedle Investments’ Tiffany Wade said.

title: Centrica CEO Eyes US for More LNG Deals and Trading Expansion
title_cn: Centrica 首席执行官将目光投向美国，寻求更多液化天然气交易和贸易扩张
summary: The UK’s Centrica Plc plans to buy more US liquefied natural gas, as it sees the fuel remaining a key part of the energy system for decades even as global geopolitical tensions highlight the need to diversify supplies.

title: India And China Say Ties Are Moving Toward Improvement
title_cn: 印度和中国表示关系正在走向改善
summary: India’s National Security Adviser Ajit Doval met Chinese Foreign Minister Wang Yi on the sidelines of a BRICS security officials’ meeting in New Delhi, with both countries noting progress in improving relations.

title: What Comes Next For Hormuz Oil Flows?
title_cn: 霍尔木兹油流接下来会发生什么？
summary: The US has issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal. Bloomberg's Weilun Soon breaks down how it is impacting on oil flows. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Historical Tensions Mar Ukraine Reconstruction Push in Poland
title_cn: 历史紧张局势三月乌克兰重建波兰
summary: Historical grievances are threatening to derail an annual Ukraine reconstruction conference in Poland and undermine ties with one of the war-torn country’s most important European allies.

title: Australia’s PM Rejects Far Right Call for ‘Monocultural’ Society
title_cn: 澳大利亚总理拒绝极右翼呼吁建立“单一文化”社会
summary: Prime Minister Anthony Albanese rejected a call from far right party leader Senator Pauline Hanson for Australia to become a “monocultural” society, saying the idea was divisive and and based on “nonsense.”

title: Russia’s Wiki Warfare Tries to Distort Reality, Documents Show
title_cn: 文件显示，俄罗斯的维基战争试图扭曲现实
summary: Leaked files reveal the Social Design Agency’s efforts to control the information that underpins search engines and AI chatbots.

title: US Gives Philippines Underwater Vehicles as China Feud Persists
title_cn: 中美争端持续，美国向菲律宾提供水下航行器
summary: The US said it provided four underwater vehicles to the Philippine military, as Washington boosts its longtime ally’s capability to counter Beijing’s actions in the South China Sea.

title: North Korea’s Kim Wants More Nuclear Forces After US-Iran War
title_cn: 美伊战争后，朝鲜金正恩希望拥有更多核力量
summary: Kim Jong Un called for North Korea to boost its nuclear capabilities “with increasing speed” and said the “bloody situation” in the Middle East makes his nuclear push the “most correct and unique way” to defend the country, state media reported.

title: LA Defeats DOJ Suit Claiming Sanctuary City Policy Fueled Riots
title_cn: 洛杉矶击败司法部诉讼，声称庇护城市政策引发骚乱
summary: Los Angeles won a court order dismissing a Trump administration lawsuit claiming its sanctuary city ordinance helped fuel riots during 2025 protests against the president’s deportation crackdown.

title: Former Fed Chairman Alan Greenspan Dies at 100
title_cn: 美联储前主席艾伦·格林斯潘去世，享年 100 岁
summary:
Alan Greenspan has died at the age of 100. He served as Fed chief for 18 years, from 1987 to 2006, and was credited with guiding a record US economic expansion, but his legacy was later dimmed by the financial crisis that erupted in 2008. Greenspan died on June 22 at his home due to complications of Parkinson's disease. Bloomberg's David Westin looks back at his accomplishments. 

This video contains an error: Alan Greenspan left the Federal Reserve over 20 years ago, not a quarter of a century. A corrected version is being prepared and will be published as soon as possible. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Removals Begin at Intelligence Office Under Trump Loyalist Pulte
title_cn: 特朗普忠诚者普尔特领导下的情报办公室开始被清除
summary: A wave of staff reductions at the Office of the Director of National Intelligence began on Monday, according to a person familiar with the matter, days after Bill Pulte, a staunch loyalist to President Donald Trump, became acting director.

title: Iran Oil Waiver Offers Lifeline to Tehran as Talks Proceed
title_cn: 随着谈判的进行，伊朗石油豁免为德黑兰提供了生命线
summary: The US issued a 60-day license allowing Iran to sell oil on the international market, giving Tehran an economic lifeline as the two adversaries continued talks for a permanent peace deal.

title: Migrant Families Separated, Re-Jailed by Trump Freed by Judge
title_cn: 被特朗普拆散、重新监禁的移民家庭被法官释放
summary: A federal judge ordered the immediate release of several immigrants who were separated from family members by the Trump administration in 2018 and later detained again by US officials.

title: Bolivia Plans Push Into Morales Stronghold as Blockades Fade
title_cn: 随着封锁的解除，玻利维亚计划挺进莫拉莱斯要塞
summary: Bolivian security forces are preparing to enter the Chapare region, where former President Evo Morales has remained since late 2024, protected by thousands of supporters while evading arrest and encouraging more than 50 days of road blockades that disrupted the economy.

title: White House Set to Host Weapons Makers Amid US Stockpile Worry
title_cn: 由于美国库存担忧，白宫将接待武器制造商
summary: The White House is set to host a meeting of defense contractors this week to push for more robust munitions production, with stockpiles under strain after nearly four months of war with Iran.

title: Trump on Iran Negotiations: “We’re Doing Very Well” | Balance of Power: Late Edition 06/22/2026
title_cn: 特朗普谈伊朗谈判：“我们做得很好” |权力平衡：最新版 06/22/2026
summary: "Balance of Power: Late Edition" focuses on the intersection of politics and global business. On today's show, Israel's Ambassador to the United Nations Danny Danon says Israel is "very comfortable" with the US representing its interests in Iran negotiations, touting a "strong alliance" with Washington even amid questions about public strains between President Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Joe Twyman, Co-founder and Director at DeltaPoll, says the economy and cost of living, not Epstein-related controversy, will likely be seen as the issue that brought Starmer down after the UK Prime Minister resigned. Representative Dan Goldman (D-NY), a member of the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees, discusses New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's endorsement of his opponent, Brad Lander, ahead of Tuesday's primary, saying Democrats broadly agree that life is "way too expensive" for most Americans. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rep. Goldman on Lander, Mamdani Ahead of Primary
title_cn: 众议员戈德曼在初选前谈兰德和马姆达尼
summary: Representative Dan Goldman (D-NY), a member of the House Judiciary and Homeland Security Committees, discusses New York Mayor Zohran Mamdani's endorsement of his opponent, Brad Lander, ahead of Tuesday's primary, saying Democrats broadly agree that life is "way too expensive" for most Americans. Goldman also criticizes President Trump's handling of the Iran war as "reckless," saying it had no clear objective or strategy and left the US in a "much worse situation," and says the US is at "much greater risk" without FISA Section 702. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Twyman: Cost of Living Brought Down Starmer
title_cn: 特威曼：生活成本压垮了斯塔默
summary: Joe Twyman, Co-founder and Director at DeltaPoll, says the economy and cost of living, not Epstein-related controversy, will likely be seen as the issue that brought Starmer down after the UK Prime Minister resigned. Twyman says newly sworn-in UK Member of Parliament Andy Burnham, viewed as the frontrunner to succeed Starmer, remains "very much an unknown quantity" nationally. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Danon Touts 'Strong Alliance' Between US, Israel
title_cn: 达能吹捧美国和以色列之间的“强大联盟”
summary: Israel's Ambassador to the United Nations Danny Danon says Israel is "very comfortable" with the US representing its interests in Iran negotiations, touting a "strong alliance" with Washington even amid questions about public strains between President Trump and Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu. Danon says the US should not make early concessions to Iran in nuclear talks, arguing sanctions and military pressure are needed to maintain leverage, and warns any deal that does not address Iran's ballistic missile program would be a "major mistake." He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Australians Value China Ties Over US as Trump Confidence Slumps
title_cn: 随着特朗普信心下降，澳大利亚人更看重与中国的关系
summary: More than half of Australians now see their nation’s relationship with China as more important than its ties to the US, a new poll showed, while confidence in President Donald Trump slumped to a record low.

title: Starmer Leaves No. 10 Without Ever Managing to Explain What He Stood For
title_cn: 斯塔默在没有解释他代表什么的情况下就离开了第十名
summary: Even when it came to his own resignation, Keir Starmer was beaten to the punch by Donald Trump.

title: Housing Bill Passes Senate With Lawmakers Under Pressure
title_cn: 住房法案在参议院获得通过，立法者面临压力
summary: The Senate passed a sweeping housing bill on Monday, bringing Washington one step closer to enacting the most significant housing legislation in a generation.

title: Oil Flows Through Hormuz, Fed Remembers Alan Greenspan | Bloomberg Businessweek Daily 6/22/2026
title_cn: 美联储纪念艾伦·格林斯潘：石油流经霍尔木兹海峡彭博商业周刊日报 6/22/2026
summary: Today, Bloomberg's Mike Mckee remembers Alan Greenspan and reflects on his legacy as Fed Chair. Then, David Lebovitz, multi-asset solutions global strategist at JPMorgan Asset Management, discusses current Fed Chair Kevin Warsh and the overall economic landscape with more eco data to drop this week. Plus, Bloomberg Opinion's Therese Raphael on UK Prime Minster Kier Starmer's decision to step down. Then, Jennifer Welch, chief geoeconomics analyst at Bloomberg Economics, discusses the status of talks between the US and Iran as oil begins to flow through the Strait of Hormuz. Finally, Silvio Tavares, CEO of VantageScore, shares an exclusive report of the state of the US consumer as borrowers adjust to inflation and higher rates. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Who Is Andy Burnham, the UK’s Likely Next Prime Minister?
title_cn: 英国可能的下一任首相安迪·伯纳姆是谁？
summary: Andy Burnham’s likely ascent to the pinnacle of UK politics reflects an aptitude as a politician, orator and organizer that many members of Parliament found lacking in the job’s current occupant, Keir Starmer. Burnham, 56, a Labour politician and former mayor of Greater Manchester, appears set to succeed Starmer as prime minister after the incumbent announced his resignation on June 22.

title: Maine Democrats Test Abortion as a Midterm Message
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人测试堕胎作为中期信息
summary: The party is using a vote from 2018 to tap voters’ anger now.

title: A Decade After Brexit, Britain Can’t Keep A Prime Minister
title_cn: 英国脱欧十年后，英国无法留任首相
summary: British Prime Minister Keir Starmer resigned today after less than two years in office. On today’s Big Take podcast, Bloomberg’s Edward Evans and guest host Wendy Benjaminson break down how Starmer became the sixth leader to quit in a decade, and what the turmoil a Downing Street means for the UK’s fractured political system and its relationships globally. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Romania’s Turmoil Deepens After PM Hopeful Loses Vote
title_cn: 总理霍普霍普落选后罗马尼亚动荡加剧
summary: Romania’s prime minister nominee failed to win parliamentary approval for his proposed cabinet, prolonging a political deadlock that risks stalling key reforms for crucial European Union recovery funding.

title: If Iran Doesn't Behave, I Will Do What I Need To Do Says Trump (Q&A)
title_cn: 特朗普表示，如果伊朗不采取行动，我将做我需要做的事（问答）
summary: President Trump spoke to reporters in the Oval Office. He said the US is doing “very well” with respect to Iran negotiations, saying that the Strait of Hormuz is open and Iran will never have a nuclear weapon.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Children’s Online Safety Bill Gains Traction in Congress
title_cn: 儿童在线安全法案在国会获得关注
summary: Momentum is growing in both the US House and Senate on dueling efforts to pass children’s online safety legislation this summer, raising prospects for a breakthrough after big tech lobbying and partisan squabbles stalled the legislation for years.

title: Trump Blames Vandalism for Reflecting Pool Problems
title_cn: 特朗普将泳池问题归咎于故意破坏行为
summary: President Donald Trump says vandals caused the algae blooms and peeling paint at the Lincoln Memorial reflecting pool. He speaks with reporters in the Oval Office. (Source: Bloomberg)
